results.name: shakedown
results.description: Give me something nice, or my big thing might hit you.

results.name: shandalar
results.description: A rogue plane, rich in mana and drifting through the blind eternities.  Serves as the setting for M10 through M15, and the Microprose computer game.

results.name: shantotto
results.description: Final Fantasy XI's most notable black mage, known for both rhyming and dangerous rage.

results.name: shapechange
results.description: Set creatures' power/toughness, not necessarily a nerf. See also [humble](/tags/card/humble).

results.name: shapesharing
results.description: Something on the battlefield becomes a copy of something else.

results.name: sharaz jek
results.description: A masked villain from the Doctor Who serial "The Caves of Androzani"

results.name: shardland
results.description: Lands that produce mana from a "shard" (three allied colours).

results.name: shares name with a mechanic
results.description: Regardless of whether it relates to that mechanic.

results.name: shattered isles
results.description: The remnants of [Argoth](argoth), a forest-island obliterated by Urza's activation of the Golgothian Sylex.

results.name: shaw
results.description: One of the last remaining dragons in the Fire Nation.

results.name: sheila
results.description: The rogue from the Dungeons and Dragons cartoon series

results.name: shendyt
results.description: An Egyptian skirt garment, worn around the waist and down to the knees.

results.name: shenmeng
results.description: The home plane of Mu Yanling and Jiang Yanggu.

results.name: shift (marvel)
results.description: An unstable shapeshifting clone of Miles Morales who first appeared in the 2021 run of the Miles Morales: Spider-Man comic. He was originally created by the Assessor to be a weapon, but decided to ally with Miles and become a hero instead.

results.name: shirma
results.description: A recurring white mage featured in the Chocobo spinoff games.
